channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Alibaba rolls out AI model, claiming it’s better than DeepSeek-V3
item.description: Chinese tech company Alibaba on Wednesday released a new version of its Qwen 2.5 artificial intelligence model that it claimed surpassed the highly-acclaimed DeepSeek-V3.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Lutnick says he won’t dismantle NOAA as called for in Project 2025
item.description: President Trump’s pick to lead the Commerce Department assured senators on Wednesday that he won’t try to dismantle the nation’s climate, oceans and weather science agency during a largely genial confirmation hearing. Sen. Maria Cantwell (D-Wash.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, The Hill

item.title: 3 key areas where AI is transforming insurance today
item.description: In the two years since generative artificial intelligence (genAI) burst onto the global stage and quickly found its way into the strategy playbooks of the world’s largest businesses, we’ve all heard a lot about the technology’s potential.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Did DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make new AI chatbot? Trump adviser thinks so
item.description: Did the upstart Chinese tech company DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make the artificial intelligence technology that shook Wall Street this week? That's what ChatGPT maker OpenAI is suggesting, along with U.S. President Donald Trump's top AI adviser.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: The end of fake VPNs? Google Play Store now shows which VPNs are secure enough to be trusted
item.description: Google's new "Verified" is designed to highlight VPN apps that prioritize user privacy and safety. Here's how it works.
item.dc:creator: chiara.castro@futurenet.com (Chiara Castro), TechRadar

item.title: 200 UK companies adopt a permanent four-day work week
item.description: Two years after participating in a groundbreaking four-day work week experiment, 200 companies in the UK have chosen to adopt the policy permanently, marking a significant shift in workplace norms.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: General purpose AI could lead to array of new risks, experts say in report ahead of AI summit
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Advanced artificial intelligence systems have the potential to create extreme new risks, such as fueling widespread job losses, enabling terrorism or running amok, experts said in a first-of-its-kind international report Wednesday cataloging the range of dangers posed by the technology
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Are we all aliens? NASA's returned asteroid samples hold the ingredients of life from a watery world
item.description: A NASA spacecraft has returned asteroid samples that hold not only the pristine building blocks for life but also the salty remains of an ancient water world.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Windows 11 users with iPhones: if you’re jealous of Android’s Start menu integration, here’s some good news – Apple phones are now getting it
item.description: Microsoft is only testing the Start menu side panel with iPhones, but it likely won’t be long before it’s introduced to the release version of Windows 11.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Steam Deck fans, you're in for a good one - AMD's FSR 3 frame generation is now available on Valve's handheld thanks to a new Decky plugin
item.description: The Steam Deck has come a long way since its 2022 launch, and a new frame generation mod will only make it the experience even better for users.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: OpenAI says DeepSeek used its models illegally, and it has evidence to prove it, new report claims
item.description: New report claims OpenAI has evidence of DeepSeek breaking its user agreement by distilling its models.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: El fuerte aumento de los costes de TI está haciendo que los CIO se centren en la innovación
item.description: Muchos directores de sistemas de la información (CIO, por sus siglas en inglés) esperan importantes subidas de precios en la nube y otros productos y servicios de TI durante 2025, lo que obligará a aquellos con presupuestos estancados a tomar decisiones difíciles sobre el gasto en TI.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Tecnología y negocio en el ámbito industrial, la convergencia de dos imprescindibles para Cerealto
item.description: Sobre los hombros de Juan Manuel García Dujo, actual Chief Information Officer (CIO, por sus siglas en inglés) de Cerealto, recae la misión de alinear las TI con los objetivos de negocio.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Trump asks Musk to 'go get' NASA astronauts stuck in space
item.description: President Trump said Tuesday that he “asked Elon Musk and @SpaceX to ‘go get’ the 2 brave astronauts who have been virtually abandoned in space.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: OpenAI announces more secure ChatGPT for government workers, Trump administration
item.description: OpenAI on Tuesday announced a new ChatGPT system for U.S. government workers that it calls more secure than its Enterprise offering. ChatGPT Gov will allow for government agencies to feed nonpublic, sensitive data into the platform while operating in their own hosting environments.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Networking terms and definitions
item.description: To find a brief definition of the networking term you are looking for user your browser’s “Find” feature then follow links to a fuller explanation. AI networking AI networking refers to the application of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies to network management and optimization.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: America’s answer to Concorde completes its first supersonic flight in a California desert
item.description: Boom Supersonic, the American company building what promises to be the world’s fastest airliner, broke the sound barrier for its first time with a test flight in Mojave.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: Upstart Chinese AI company DeepSeek's founder started out as a low-key hedge fund entrepreneur
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — The 40-year-old founder of China’s DeepSeek, an AI startup that has startled markets with its capacity to compete with industry leaders like OpenAI, kept a low profile as he built up a hedge fund and then refined its quantitative models to branch into artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: DeepSeek just blew up the AI industry’s narrative that it needs more money and power
item.description: The Chinese company’s large language model is basically a cheaper, more efficient ChatGPT, built on a fraction of OpenAI’s budget and using far fewer chips than any other leading chatbot.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: Trump says Microsoft is one of the companies eyeing TikTok
item.description: President Donald Trump said Monday evening that Microsoft is among the U.S. companies looking to take control of TikTok to help the popular app avert an effective ban that could kick-in in April.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Nvidia Shares Plummet Amid Concerns Over Chinese AI Startup DeepSeek - Stock Market Tumbles
item.description: Nvidia Corp's shares tumble 13% after investor concerns over Chinese AI startup DeepSeek, erasing a record amount of stock-market value and causing the S&P 500 to fall as much as 2.3%.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Prompt Security adds code sanitization, data leak prevention for GitHub Copilot
item.description: Prompt Security has announced an upgrade to its security and governance platform for GitHub Copilot and other AI coding assistants.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Outsmart hackers who are out to steal your identity
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson offers tips on how to protect your identity: Be vigilant, monitor accounts, use smart security, know theft response.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cisco: Latest news and insights
item.description: Cisco is the dominant vendor in enterprise networking, and under CEO Chuck Robbins, it continues to shake things up. Its most recent mega-acquisition is its $28 billion purchase of Splunk, a bold move that adds revenue opportunities in observability, data analytics, AIOps, and genAI.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: High-speed Ethernet switches a bright spot in network forecasts
item.description: Switches and routers remain the workhorses of the networking world. Viewed through that lens, 2024 offered a mixed bag of results for the networking market. There were numerous areas of decline, particularly in the enterprise market, according to some analysts.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How to pick the right SAST tool
item.description: Like pretty much any security tool, picking a SAST (static application security testing) tool isn’t a matter of “What’s the best?” but rather “What’s the best for me?” Whether you already have a tool that needs replacing or you’re starting from greenfield, it’s helpful to understand the market so yo
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Sweden seizes vessel suspected of 'sabotage' after undersea data cable rupture in Baltic Sea
item.description: RIGA, Latvia (AP) — Swedish prosecutors announced Sunday night that they have opened a preliminary investigation into suspected aggravated “sabotage” and ordered the detention of a vessel in the Baltic Sea suspected of damaging an underwater fiber optic cable connecting Latvia and the Swedish island
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Families sue TikTok in France over teen suicides they say are linked to harmful content
item.description: CASSIS, France (AP) — In the moment when her world shattered three years ago, Stephanie Mistre found her 15-year-old daughter, Marie, lifeless in the bedroom where she died by suicide.
item.dc:creator: TOM NOUVIAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: People are hawking TikTok-loaded phones for thousands on eBay, Facebook
item.description: People are listing phones preloaded with TikTok for tens of thousands of dollars on eBay, Facebook marketplace and other online storefronts — though it is not clear if there are many buyers at those prices. TikTok was briefly unavailable to U.S.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: The Navy’s researchers come up with a robot that operates out of this world
item.description: "We're focused on geosynchronous Earth orbit, where the most valuable real estate in space," said Bernie Kelm. The post The Navy’s researchers come up with a robot that operates out of this world first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Ready or not, here it comes: GenAI in 2025
item.description: If you’re a software developer right now, it is nearly impossible to avoid chatter about generative AI. You’re probably already using AI tools in your work, whether you like it or not. Some of your normie friends are using ChatGPT as a search engine, with hilarious and alarming results.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Spain's leader wants the EU to ‘make social media great again.’ Here's how
item.description: DAVOS, Switzerland (AP) — Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez is launching a crusade against what he sees as the downsides of social media.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON and JAMEY KEATEN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Tips on overcoming the loss of cherished, personal belongings in disasters
item.description: Losing important sentimental belongings — those items that represented who you are — can be traumatic for those who go through disasters that destroy homes.
item.dc:creator: JULIA RUBIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: How to cope when disasters strip away photos, heirlooms and other pieces of the past
item.description: They’re the possessions that tell your story: the photos of old friends and relatives. The ring your mom left you. The hand-knit Christmas stockings. Your grandfather's secretary desk and the letters inside.
item.dc:creator: JULIA RUBIN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Pakistan's parliament passes bill with sweeping controls on social media
item.description: ISLAMABAD (AP) — Pakistan’s lower house of parliament on Thursday passed a controversial bill that will give the government sweeping controls on social media, including sending users to prison for spreading disinformation.
item.dc:creator: MUNIR AHMED, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Screen breaks and the right desk setup offer relief from work-related eye strain
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The trouble started every day at around 3 p.m., after Cathy Higgins had spent five or six hours staring at an array of computer screens at her desk. Her university job overseeing research projects involved peering closely at numbers and details on contracts, applications and budgets.
item.dc:creator: CATHY BUSSEWITZ, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Musk clashes with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman over Trump-supported Stargate AI data center project
item.description: Elon Musk is clashing with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman over the Stargate artificial intelligence infrastructure project touted by President Donald Trump, the latest in a feud between the two tech billionaires that started on OpenAI's board and is now testing Musk's influence with the new president.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, NewsNation
